strengths: Deep technical breadth across multiple domains (web, mobile, infrastructure) with 15+ years of experience and proven ability to adopt new technologies quickly
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on commitment to cutting-edge AI technology
Proven entrepreneurial track record including founding GISCollective (ongoing since 2016) and multiple early-stage company experiences
concerns: No demonstrated Director-level individual contributor experience; highest titles are Staff/Senior Engineer without evidence of strategic seniority required for the role
AI expertise is recent (14 months at re:cinq) and not yet proven at scale; lacks 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms'
Missing preferred qualifications: no Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; only BS in Computer Science and unrelated degree in Photography

key_factors.factor: Recent but directly relevant AI infrastructure experience
Strong technical foundation with entrepreneurial track record

response.justification: Bogdan is an accomplished technical engineer with genuine current experience in AI infrastructure—exactly the right problem space. However, the role requires Director-level individual contributor leadership, and his resume demonstrates Staff/Senior seniority without strategic influence at that level. His AI work, while relevant and current (14 months), is too recent to satisfy the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products' preference. He has strong potential but is currently under-leveled for a principal-engineer strategic role.
